g.text: 3. Store List Reranking — sets class-level mutable var
4. Intermixing Split — splits store list at index 30
Modifying one concern requires understanding all others.
Adding an experiment: 2-3 weeks of careful threading through shared state.
Coarse Pipeline · Same code, explicit state
DVs still resolved inside existing methods — unchanged from current
Data between steps is explicit (state fields, not local vars)
DV-gated: instant rollback by turning off the flag
Zero behavior change — same code called in same order
DVs still resolved inside existing methods (scattered)
Concerns still bundled within coarse steps
Full Decomposition · Single responsibility per step
31 DVs resolved once per request → state.featureFlags
Add a step = add a class. No existing code modified.
Skip a step = isApplicable() returns false. No code deleted.
Test a step = unit test one class. No mocking of unrelated concerns.
Each step reads DVs from state.featureFlags via isApplicable()
No scattered static calls · DV interactions become explicit and documentable
